generation.image_prompt: Including exactly nine golden pentacles arranged in a lush garden. 1900s mystical lithography style. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A noble anthropomorphic leopard cat in a long embroidered robe stands calmly. Nine large golden pentacles are visible among the flowers and vines. A small falcon perches on the cat's hand. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat face, white ear spots, forehead stripes. No borders. Full bleed.
generation.narrative: The Nine of Pentacles is 'The Protected Sanctuary'—a high-quality, secure habitat where an individual can thrive in peace and self-sufficiency.

meanings.upright: Abundance, self-sufficiency, independence, and thriving in high-quality habitat.
meanings.reversed: Restlessness, burnout, or a return to world before full recovery.

ecology.mapping_note: Nine of Pentacles represents 'The Secure Territory'—a female leopard cat successfully raising offspring in a large, undisturbed core area.

website.excerpt: The NINE OF PENTACLES reimagined as a story of survival and material prosperity for the Taiwan leopard cat.
website.seo_description: Abundance, self-sufficiency, independence, and thriving in high-quality habitat.

meaning.zh: 豐足、自給自足、獨立，以及在高品質棲地中的繁榮生活。
meaning.en: Abundance, self-sufficiency, independence, and thriving in high-quality habitat.
